mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or forward returns are negative in >55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate exceeding 5.5% signals deteriorating labor market conditions that compress corporate earnings growth, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >60% of instances where UNRATE crosses 5.5%, or the signal loses statistical significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real state sales combined with stable consumer price inflation indicates robust household demand without monetary tightening pressure, producing positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to outperform a single-proxy baseline, or forward returns are negative in >50% of triggered periods over a 2-year walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production growth during a monetary easing cycle reflects expanding economic capacity that supports near-term equity price appreciation over the next week.
failure_condition: The signal generates negative forward returns in >55% of observations during easing cycles, or the predictive power vanishes when FEDFUNDS is rising.

mechanism_narrative: Consecutive monthly declines in housing starts signal weakening residential investment that drags on aggregate demand, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >60% of periods following two consecutive housing starts declines, or the signal shows no predictive power in a 3-year rolling IC test.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll employment surpassing 143 million indicates strong labor market absorption that supports consumer spending and corporate revenues, yielding positive equity returns over the next week.
failure_condition: The threshold signal produces negative forward returns in >50% of triggered instances, or Rank IC remains below 0.01 over a 24-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation alongside a low federal funds rate forces expectations of aggressive monetary tightening, compressing equity valuations and generating negative forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >55% of periods when inflation accelerates above 0.4% monthly, or the interaction term loses statistical significance in out-of-sample regression.

mechanism_narrative: Synchronized growth in industrial production and nonfarm payrolls confirms broad-based economic expansion that sustains corporate profit margins, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The signal fails to predict positive returns in >50% of observations, or the combined proxy set underperforms a market-neutral benchmark over a 3-year walk-forward period.
